title: Midnight Zha Jiang Mian
description: A classic Chinese noodle dish, Midnight Zha Jiang Mian is a staple of Chinese cuisine, rich in flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Ground pork
ingredients.notes: or substitute with beef or tofu for a vegetarian option

instructions: Bring a pot of water to a boil and cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the ground pork to the wok and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink.
Add the chopped scallions to the wok and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the Zha Jiang sauce and soy sauce to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the wok and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with sesame seeds if using.
